---
title: "Measures Documentation"
author: "FONDECYT 1191299"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date())`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    toc_float: true
    df_print: paged
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(knitr)
  library(kableExtra)
  library(DT)
})

data_dir <- "data"
mm_path <- file.path(data_dir, "measure_metadata.csv")
mi_path <- file.path(data_dir, "measure_items.csv")
pm_path <- file.path(data_dir, "present_measures.csv")

stopifnot(file.exists(mm_path), file.exists(mi_path), file.exists(pm_path))

measure_metadata <- readr::read_csv(mm_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
measure_items    <- readr::read_csv(mi_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
present_measures <- readr::read_csv(pm_path, show_col_types = FALSE)

# Helper to preserve line breaks when rendering HTML
nl2br <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x), "", x)
  stringr::str_replace_all(x, "\\r?\\n", "<br/>")
}

# Helper to pick the first existing column from a set of candidates
col_pick <- function(df, candidates) {
  for (nm in candidates) {
    if (nm %in% names(df)) return(df[[nm]])
  }
  rep(NA_character_, nrow(df))
}

# Measures to document: only those that appear in responses
measures_to_document <- present_measures %>%
  select(measure_id) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  left_join(measure_metadata, by = "measure_id") %>%
  arrange(measure_title, measure_id)
```

## Overview

- Source: `data/measure_metadata.csv`, `data/measure_items.csv`, `data/present_measures.csv`.
- Scope: Only measures actually present in the extracted responses.
- Item fields: prompt, label, required, position, notes, long description.

```{r summary-table}
overview <- measures_to_document %>%
  transmute(
    Measure = dplyr::coalesce(measure_title, paste0("Measure ", measure_id)),
    `Measure ID` = measure_id
  )

knitr::kable(overview, align = c("l", "c")) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)
```

## Measures

```{r measures-loop, results='asis'}
if (nrow(measures_to_document) == 0) {
  cat("<p><em>No measures present in responses.</em></p>")
} else {
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(measures_to_document))) {
    mrow <- measures_to_document[i, ]
    mid  <- mrow$measure_id
    mttl <- dplyr::coalesce(col_pick(mrow, c("measure_title")), paste0("Measure ", mid))
    mshort <- col_pick(mrow, c("measure_short_name", "short_name", "measure_code", "slug"))
    mshort <- ifelse(is.na(mshort), "", mshort)
    mver <- col_pick(mrow, c("measure_version", "version"))
    mver <- ifelse(is.na(mver), "", mver)
    mdesc <- col_pick(mrow, c("measure_description", "description"))
    mdesc <- ifelse(is.na(mdesc), "", mdesc)

    cat(sprintf("<details open>\n<summary><strong>%s</strong> (ID: %s)%s%s</summary>\n",
                htmltools::htmlEscape(mttl),
                htmltools::htmlEscape(as.character(mid)),
                if (nzchar(mshort)) paste0(" — ", htmltools::htmlEscape(mshort)) else "",
                if (nzchar(mver)) paste0(" — v", htmltools::htmlEscape(as.character(mver))) else ""))

    if (nzchar(mdesc)) {
      cat(sprintf("<p>%s</p>\n", nl2br(mdesc)))
    }

    # Build item table with all available exported fields
    items_raw <- measure_items %>% filter(measure_id == mid)
    if (nrow(items_raw) > 0) {
      # Identify description column (handles possible trailing % or alternative naming)
      desc_col <- names(items_raw)[grepl('^item_description_long', names(items_raw))]
      if (length(desc_col) == 0) desc_col <- names(items_raw)[grepl('^description_long', names(items_raw))]
      if (length(desc_col) == 0) desc_col <- NA_character_

      items <- items_raw %>%
        mutate(
          item_position_disp = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(col_pick(., c('item_position','position')))),
          item_label_disp = col_pick(., c('item_label','label')),
          item_prompt_disp = col_pick(., c('item_prompt','prompt','text','title','question')),
          item_explanation_disp = col_pick(., c('item_explanation','explanation','rationale')),
          item_required_disp = col_pick(., c('item_required','item_is_required','required')),
          item_notes_disp = col_pick(., c('item_notes','notes')),
          item_description_long_disp = if (!is.na(desc_col[1])) .[[desc_col[1]]] else col_pick(., c('item_description_long','description_long','long_description'))
        ) %>%
        transmute(
          `Item ID` = item_id,
          Position = item_position_disp,
          Label = item_label_disp,
          Prompt = item_prompt_disp,
          Explanation = nl2br(item_explanation_disp),
          Required = item_required_disp,
          Notes = nl2br(item_notes_disp),
          `Long Description` = nl2br(item_description_long_disp)
        ) %>%
        arrange(Position, `Item ID`)
    } else {
      items <- items_raw
    }

    if (nrow(items) == 0) {
      cat("<p><em>No item metadata found for this measure.</em></p>\n")
    } else {
      # Static HTML table to ensure all items always visible when knit
      items %>%
        knitr::kable(escape = FALSE, align = 'l') %>%
        kableExtra::kable_styling(full_width = TRUE, font_size = 12) %>%
        kableExtra::scroll_box(width = '100%', height = '400px') %>%
        print()
    }

    cat("</details>\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
